title: Pack5pxt
description: A pack with small trains for FVTM
body:
_Currently the most detailed trains addon pack for FVTM!_

1.12.2 -> Forge    
1.20.1 -> Forge    
26.1.+ -> Fabric    

This pack/mod currently includes:
- a diesel engine (loco1)
- a steam engine (loco2)
- a flatbed wagon (wagon1)
- a box wagon (wagon2)
- a tank wagon (wagon3)
- a passenger wagon (wagon4)
- a livestock wagon (wagon5)
- a passenger wagon with cabin (cwagon1)

 
Every rolling stock is repaintable (white by default), ~~this pack also includes a few presets~~ (not on fvtm v4 yet).
- Wagon2, Wagon4, Wagon5 and Loco2 have two colour channels (primary and secondary).
- Wagon1, Wagon2 and Wagon3 have an inventory (item/fluid).
- Wagon4 can transport players (and entities), Wagon5 can transport Animals.

### Bilibili
https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1w9TbzsES5.    
[https://space.bilibili.com/2104691318](https://space.bilibili.com/2104691318)

## PLEASE NOTE / IMPORTANT
**FVTM TRAINS ARE STILL BEING WORKED ON!**
Some circumstances may cause (game) crashes, remember to make backups of important worlds when playing modded!

## Dependencies:
- FVTM (Fex's Vehicle & Transportation Mod)
- GEP (General Essentials Pack)
